claim: Extend the write-flow front door to the todo collection: a sanctioned entry point for flipping a materialized item's status (open -> done, with discharge notes). The belief half of the gap closed with mix cb.evidence (a522); the todo half remains - every t-item status flip is still a hand-rolled script against todos.json, and the flip is half of every discharge.

evidence.detail: Two specimens bracket the gap: the t0013 flip went through raw python (the ensure_ascii incident's other half), and the t0014 flip went through an ad-hoc mix run -e script in the very session that built the evidence front door - the a522 discharge could sanction its own evidence append but not its own todo flip. Preflight 2026-06-12: 0 contract, 2 non-contract flags (a494, a498), both bare tag_overlap with no semantic contact - a498 (canon changes through the write flow) is supportive in spirit; reviewed per c055 and proceeded.
